program.name: Warehouse Mock Reservation
intake.purpose: Use an in-memory warehouse catalog to decide whether an order can reserve requested units.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"inventory_lookup","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.sku","runtime.now"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","adapter_kind":"in_memory_mock","sku":"string","available_units":"number","location":"string","checked_at":"ISO timestamp string"},"items_json":["sku:<sku>","available_units:<available_units>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Use only the in-memory mock warehouse catalog; do not call a network or external service.","The mock catalog contains SKU-RED-5 with available_units 8 at location A2 and SKU-BLUE-9 with available_units 0 at location B1.","For an unknown sku, return available_units 0 and location UNKNOWN while preserving the requested sku.","adapter_kind is in_memory_mock and checked_at is runtime.now()."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal inventory_lookup.","adapter_kind must be in_memory_mock in both result_json and StageOutput.adapter_kind.","items_json must be exactly [\"sku:<sku>\", \"available_units:<available_units>\"]."]}},{"slug":"reservation_decision","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.order_id","inputs.initial_user_text.requested_units","inventory_lookup.output.result_json.sku","inventory_lookup.output.result_json.available_units"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","order_id":"string","sku":"string","requested_units":"number","reserved":"boolean","reserved_units":"number","backorder_units":"number","reason":"string"},"items_json":["reserved:<reserved>","reserved_units:<reserved_units>","backorder_units:<backorder_units>"]},"rules":["Parse inventory_lookup.output.result_json and the original request JSON before deciding.","reserved is true only when requested_units is greater than 0 and available_units is greater than or equal to requested_units.","reserved_units equals requested_units when reserved is true; otherwise reserved_units is 0.","backorder_units = Math.max(0, requested_units - available_units).","reason is stock_available when reserved is true; otherwise reason is insufficient_stock."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal reservation_decision.","sku must be preserved from inventory_lookup.output.result_json.sku.","items_json must be exactly [\"reserved:<reserved>\", \"reserved_units:<reserved_units>\", \"backorder_units:<backorder_units>\"]."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
